itemDisplayName: Deploy a Debian 13 (Bookworm) VM with Trusted Launch
description: Deploys a Debian 13 Gen2 virtual machine with Trusted Launch (Secure Boot + vTPM), Standard public IP, SSH key or password authentication, and configurable VM size. Uses the official Debian publisher image from Azure Marketplace.
summary: Debian 13 (Bookworm) Gen2 VM with Trusted Launch, Standard public IP, and SSH key auth.
